traits.name: Attribute Increase
traits.description: Choose an Attribute. The chosen Attribute increases by 1 (up to the Attribute Limit).

traits.name: Skill Expertise
traits.description: Choose a Skill. Your Mastery Cap and Mastery Level in the chosen Skill both increase by 1. You can only benefit from 1 Feature that increases your Skill Mastery Limit at a time.

traits.name: Human Resolve
traits.description: Your Death's Door Threshold value is expanded by 1.

traits.name: Undying
traits.description: You have ADV on Saves against the Doomed Condition.

traits.name: Trade Expertise
traits.description: Choose a Trade. Your Mastery Cap and Mastery Level in the chosen Trade both increase by 1. You can only benefit from 1 Feature that increases your Trade Mastery Limit at a time.

traits.name: Human Determination
traits.description: Once per Combat, you can give yourself ADV on an Attack, Martial, or Spell Check while Bloodied.

traits.name: Unbreakable
traits.description: You have ADV on Death Saves.

traits.name: Attribute Decrease
traits.description: Choose an Attribute. You decrease the chosen Attribute by 1 (to a minimum of -2).

traits.name: Elven Will
traits.description: You have ADV on Checks and Saves against being Charmed and put to Sleep.

traits.name: Nimble
traits.description: When you take the Dodge Action, you instead gain the benefits of the Full Dodge Action.

traits.name: Agile Explorer
traits.description: You’re not affected by Difficult Terrain.

traits.name: Discerning Sight
traits.description: You have ADV on Checks and Saves made to discern through visual illusions.

traits.name: Quick Reactions
traits.description: While you aren't wearing Armor, you gain +1 PD.

traits.name: Peerless Sight
traits.description: You don't have DisADV as a result of making an Attack with a Weapon at Long Range

traits.name: Climb Speed
traits.description: You gain a Climb Speed equal to your Movement Speed.

traits.name: Speed Increase
traits.description: Your Speed increases by 1 Space.

traits.name: Trade Expertise
traits.description: Choose a Trade. Your Mastery Cap and Mastery Level in the chosen Trade both increase by 1. You can only benefit from 1 Feature that increases your Trade Mastery Limit at a time.

traits.name: Plant Knowledge
traits.description: While within forests, jungles, and swamps, you have ADV on Survival Checks. Additionally, you have ADV on Nature Checks made to recall information about plants.

traits.name: Brittle
traits.description: Your AD decreases by 1.

traits.name: Frail
traits.description: Your HP maximum decreases by 2.

traits.name: Might Attribute Decrease
traits.description: You decrease your Might by 1 (to a minimum of -2).

traits.name: Tough
traits.description: Your HP maximum increases by 1.

traits.name: Toxic Fortitude
traits.description: You have Poison Resistance (Half) and ADV on Saves against being Poisoned.

traits.name: Physically Sturdy
traits.description: You have ADV on Saves against being Impaired, Deafened, or Petrified.

traits.name: Iron Stomach
traits.description: You have ADV on Saves against effects that come from consuming food or liquids.

traits.name: Thick-Skinned
traits.description: While you aren't wearing Armor, you gain +1 AD.

traits.name: Natural Combatant
traits.description: You gain Combat Training with Heavy Armor and All Shields.

traits.name: Stone Blood
traits.description: You have ADV on Saves against Bleeding. Additionally, you can spend 1 AP to end the Bleeding Condition on yourself.

traits.name: Minor Tremorsense
traits.description: You have Tremorsense 3 Spaces.

traits.name: Stubborn
traits.description: You have ADV on Saves against being Taunted and against being forcibly moved.

traits.name: Trade Expertise
traits.description: Choose a Crafting or Services Trade. Your Mastery Cap and Mastery Level in the chosen Trade both increase by 1.

traits.name: Earthen Knowledge
traits.description: While within mountainous and subterranean environments, you have ADV on Survival Checks. Additionally, you have ADV on Nature Checks made to recall information about rocks, soil, crystals, and gems.

traits.name: Charisma Attribute Decrease
traits.description: You decrease your Charisma by 1 (to a minimum of -2).

traits.name: Short-Legged
traits.description: Your Speed decreases by 1 Space.

traits.name: Small-Sized
traits.description: Your Size is considered Small.

traits.name: Elusive
traits.description: When you take the Disengage Action, you instead gain the benefits of the Full Disengage Action.

traits.name: Halfling Bravery
traits.description: You have ADV on Saves against being Frightened, Intimidated, or Terrified.

traits.name: Halfling Endurance
traits.description: You have Exhaustion Resistance.

traits.name: Deft Footwork
traits.description: You can move through the space of a hostile creature 1 size larger than you as if it were Difficult Terrain.

traits.name: Beast Whisperer
traits.description: You can speak to Beasts in a limited manner. They can understand the meanings of simple words, concepts, or states of emotion. You don't have a special ability to understand them in return.

traits.name: Beast Insight
traits.description: You can understand Beasts in a limited manner. You can understand the meaning of their noises and behaviors, though they have no special ability to understand you in return.

traits.name: Burst of Bravery
traits.description: Once per Combat, you can end the Frightened, Intimidated, or Terrified Condition on yourself for free at any time.

traits.name: Trade Expertise
traits.description: Choose a Trade. Your Mastery Cap and Mastery Level in the chosen Trade both increase by 1. You can only benefit from 1 Feature that increases your Trade Mastery Limit at a time.

traits.name: Critter Knowledge
traits.description: You have ADV on Nature, Survival, and Animal Checks involving Small size creatures and smaller.

traits.name: Brittle
traits.description: Your AD decreases by 1.

traits.name: Intelligence Attribute Decrease
traits.description: You decrease your Intelligence by 1 (to a minimum of -2).

traits.name: Short-Legged
traits.description: Your Speed decreases by 1 Space.

traits.name: Small-Sized
traits.description: Your Size is considered Small.

traits.name: Escape Artist
traits.description: You have ADV on Checks and Saves to avoid or escape being Grappled or Restrained.

traits.name: Magnified Vision
traits.description: You have ADV on Investigation Checks made on something you're holding or touching.

traits.name: Mental Clarity
traits.description: You have ADV on Saves against being Dazed or Stunned.

traits.name: Strong-Minded
traits.description: You gain Psychic Resistance (1).

traits.name: Predict Weather
traits.description: You can naturally tell what the weather is going to be in the next hour in the area within 1 mile of you. You don't have DisADV on Checks or Saves as a result of naturally occurring weather.

traits.name: Mana Increase
traits.description: Your MP maximum increases by 1.

traits.name: Trapper
traits.description: You have ADV on Investigation Checks to spot Traps and on Trickery Checks to Hide Traps.

traits.name: Lightning Insulation
traits.description: You have Lightning Resistance (Half) and can't be struck by natural lightning.

traits.name: Trade Expertise
traits.description: Choose a Crafting or Subterfuge Trade. Your Mastery Cap and Mastery Level in the chosen Trade both increase by 1.

traits.name: Storm Knowledge
traits.description: While within rainy, snowy, or stormy environments, you have ADV on Survival Checks. Additionally, you have ADV on Knowledge Checks made to recall information about rain, snow, and storms.

traits.name: Agility Attribute Decrease
traits.description: You decrease your Agility by 1 (to a minimum of -2).

traits.name: Short-Legged
traits.description: Your Speed decreases by 1 Space.

traits.name: Cursed Mind
traits.description: You gain Psychic Vulnerability (1).

traits.name: Orc Rush
traits.description: Once per Combat when you willingly move toward an enemy, you can spend 1 AP to gain Temp HP equal to your Prime Modifier.

traits.name: Brutal Strikes
traits.description: You deal +1 damage when you score a Brutal or Critical Hit with a Melee Weapon or Unarmed Strike.

traits.name: Tough
traits.description: Your HP maximum increases by 1.

traits.name: Orcish Resolve
traits.description: You gain 1 additional AP while on Death's Door.

traits.name: Already Cursed
traits.description: You have ADV on Saves against Curses.

traits.name: Intimidating Shout
traits.description: Once per Combat, you can spend 1 AP to let out an Intimidating Shout. All creatures within 5 Spaces that can hear you must make a Charisma Save contested by your Attack Check. Failure: A target is Hindered on the next Attack Check or Spell Attack it makes before the start of your next turn.

traits.name: Orc Dash
traits.description: Once per Combat you can use your Minor Action to move, as long as that movement is towards an enemy.

traits.name: Finishing Blow
traits.description: You deal +1 damage to creatures who are Well-Bloodied.

traits.name: Imposing Presence
traits.description: Once per Combat when a creature makes an Attack against you, you can force them to make a Charisma Save. Save Failure: They must choose a new target for the Attack. If there are no other targets, then the Attack is wasted.

traits.name: Provocation
traits.description: You have DisADV on Checks and Saves against being Taunted.

traits.name: Reckless
traits.description: Your PD decreases by 1.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision 10 Spaces.

traits.name: Draconic Resistance
traits.description: You gain Resistance (Half) to your Draconic damage type.

traits.name: Draconic Breath Weapon
traits.description: You gain a Breath Weapon that you can use by spending 2 AP to exhale destructive power in an Area or Focused against a specific target. You can use this ability once per Long Rest, and regain the ability to use it again when you roll for Initiative. Area: Make a Spell Attack against every target's AD within a 3 Space Cone or 6 Space Line. Hit: The target takes 2 Draconic damage. Focused: Make a Spell Attack against 1 target's PD within 6 Spaces. Hit: The target takes 4 Draconic damage. Before you make your Spell Check, you can spend 1 or more SP, MP, or a combination of both to increase the damage. When you do, the Area damage increases by 1 per 2 SP spent or 1 MP spent, and the Focused damage increases by 1 per SP spent and by 2 per MP spent.

traits.name: Reptilian Superiority
traits.description: You have ADV on Intimidation Checks against reptilian creatures of Medium Size and smaller (not including other Dragonborn).

traits.name: Mana Increase
traits.description: Your MP maximum increases by 1.

traits.name: Thick-Skinned
traits.description: While you aren't wearing Armor, you gain +1 AD.

traits.name: Second Breath
traits.description: (requires Draconic Breath Weapon) You can now use your Draconic Breath Weapon twice per Combat. Additionally, whenever you use your Draconic Breath Weapon, you can spend 2 uses to increase the damage by 2 if it's an Area, or by 4 if it's Focused.

traits.name: Concussive Breath
traits.description: (requires Draconic Breath Weapon) When you use your Draconic Breath Weapon, you can force all targets to make a Physical Save. Save Failure: The target is pushed 1 Space away +1 additional Space for every 5 it fails its Save by.

traits.name: Draconic Affinity
traits.description: When you take damage of the same type as your Draconic damage, your next Draconic Breath Weapon deals +1 bonus damage.

traits.name: Dying Breath
traits.description: (requires Draconic Breath Weapon) Once per Combat when you enter Death's Door, you regain a use of your Draconic Breath Weapon and can immediately use it as a Reaction for free (0 AP).

traits.name: Draconic Ward
traits.description: Once per Combat when you enter Death's Door, you gain 2 Temp HP. Whenever you're Hit by a Melee Attack while you have this Temp HP, your Attacker takes 1 Draconic damage.

traits.name: Draconic Protection
traits.description: Once per Combat, when an ally within 20 Spaces is on Death's Door, you begin to surge with an ancient power. While they remain on Death's Door their PD and AD increases by 5 until Combat ends.

traits.name: Glide Speed
traits.description: You have a set of wings that you can use to horizontally glide and slow your descent. Provided you aren't Incapacitated, you gain the following benefits while in the air: Controlled Falling: You suffer no damage from Controlled Falling. Altitude Drop: If you end your turn midair, you Controlled Fall 4 Spaces. Glide Speed: You can use your movement to glide horizontally.

traits.name: Guardian's Bond
traits.description: Once per Combat when an ally enters Death's Door within 20 Spaces of you, you take an amount of True damage equal to your Prime Modifier.

traits.name: Tough
traits.description: Your HP maximum increases by 1.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You increase by 1 Size, but you occupy the Space of a creature 1 Size smaller.

traits.name: Unstoppable
traits.description: You have ADV on Saves against being Slowed or Stunned.

traits.name: Giant's Resolve
traits.description: While on Death's Door, you reduce all damage taken by 1.

traits.name: Unyielding Movement
traits.description: You're immune to being Slowed 2 (or higher).

traits.name: Giant's Fortitude
traits.description: (requires Giant's Resolve) You also gain the benefits of your Giant's Resolve Trait while Well-Bloodied.

traits.name: Strong Body
traits.description: Once per Combat when you take damage from an Attack, you can reduce the damage taken by an amount equal to your Might or Agility (your choice).

traits.name: Mighty Hurl
traits.description: You throw creatures 1 Space farther than normal, and objects (including Weapons) 5 Spaces farther than normal.

traits.name: Titanic Toss
traits.description: You have ADV on Checks made to throw creatures. Additionally, you don't have DisADV as a result of making an Attack with a Weapon with the Toss or Thrown Property at Long Range.

traits.name: Mighty Leap
traits.description: You can use your Might instead of Agility to determine your Jump Distance and the damage you take from Falling.

traits.name: Brute
traits.description: Once per Combat, you can take the Shove or Grapple Action as a Minor Action.

traits.name: Heavy Riser
traits.description: You have to spend 4 Spaces of movement to stand up from Prone.

traits.name: Clumsiness
traits.description: You have DisADV on Agility Checks.

traits.name: Intelligence Attribute Decrease
traits.description: You decrease your Intelligence by 1 (to a minimum of -2).

traits.name: Fallen
traits.description: You can now spend your Ancestry Points on Fiendborn Traits.

traits.name: Radiant Resistance
traits.description: You have Resistance (Half) to Radiant damage.

traits.name: Celestial Magic
traits.description: You learn 1 Spell of your choice from the Divine Spell List. Once per Long Rest, you can cast the chosen Spell spending 1 less MP than normal (minimum of 0 MP). The Spells total MP cost (before all reductions) still can't exceed your Mana Spend Limit.

traits.name: Healing Touch
traits.description: Once per Combat, you can spend 1 AP to touch a creature and Heal it. Make a DC 10 Spell Check. Success: You can restore up to 2 HP to the target. Success (each 5): +1 HP. Failure: You only restore 1 HP.

traits.name: Divine Glow
traits.description: Your body can emit a Bright Light in a 5 Space radius around you at will.

traits.name: Mana Increase
traits.description: Your MP maximum increases by 1.

traits.name: Celestial Clarity
traits.description: You have ADV on Saves against being Blinded or Deafened.

traits.name: Angelic Insight
traits.description: Once per Long Rest you can grant yourself ADV on an Insight Check to see if someone is lying.

traits.name: Gift of the Angels
traits.description: Once per Combat you can spend 1 AP and 1 MP and touch a creature to heal them over time. The creature recovers 1 HP at the start of each of their turns for 1 minute (5 Rounds).

traits.name: Blinding Light
traits.description: Once per Combat, you can spend 1 AP to choose a creature within 5 Spaces and make a Spell Check contested by its Physical Save. Success: The target is Blinded until the end of your next turn.

traits.name: Glide Speed
traits.description: You have a set of wings that you can use to horizontally glide and slow your descent. Provided you aren't Incapacitated, you gain the following benefits while in the air: Controlled Falling: You suffer no damage from Controlled Falling. Altitude Drop: If you end your turn midair, you Controlled Fall 4 Spaces. Glide Speed: You can use your movement to glide horizontally.

traits.name: Pacifist
traits.description: Your divine call is to put others before yourself and resist doing harm. You suffer a -1 penalty to all Checks and Saves made during the first round of Combat.

traits.name: Umbral Weakness
traits.description: You have Umbral Vulnerability (1).

traits.name: Redeemed
traits.description: You can now spend your Ancestry Points on Angelborn Traits.

traits.name: Fiendish Resistance
traits.description: You gain Resistance (Half) to your Fiendish damage type.

traits.name: Fiendish Magic
traits.description: You learn 1 Spell of your choice from the Arcane Spell List from the Elemental or Enchantment Spell Schools. If the Spell deals damage, it must be the same damage type as your Fiendish damage. Once per Long Rest, you can cast the chosen Spell spending 1 less MP than normal (minimum of 0 MP). The Spell's total MP cost (before all reductions) still can't exceed your Mana Spend Limit.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have a Darkvision of 10 Spaces.

traits.name: Light's Bane
traits.description: You can spend 1 AP to snuff out a mundane light source within 5 Spaces of you.

traits.name: Mana Increase
traits.description: Your MP maximum increases by 1.

traits.name: Silver-Tongued
traits.description: Once per Long Rest you can grant yourself ADV on an Influence Check when trying to deceive someone.

traits.name: Fiendish Aura
traits.description: You learn the Sorcery Cantrip, but you must choose the type of energy that's the same as your Fiendish Origin.

traits.name: Superior Darkvision
traits.description: Your Darkvision increases to 20 Spaces.

traits.name: Infernal Bravery
traits.description: You have ADV on Saves against being Intimidated.

traits.name: Intimidator
traits.description: Once per Combat you can take the Intimidate Action as a Minor Action.

traits.name: Charming Gaze
traits.description: You can spend 1 AP to gaze upon a creature you can see within 10 Spaces that can also see you. Make a Spell Check contested by the target's Repeated Charisma Save. Success: The creature becomes Charmed by you for 1 minute. You can use this ability once per Long Rest, and when you roll for Initiative, or meet some other unique criteria at the GM's discretion, this ability recharges.

traits.name: Glide Speed
traits.description: You have a set of wings that you can use to horizontally glide and slow your descent. Provided you aren't Incapacitated, you gain the following benefits while in the air: Controlled Falling: You suffer no damage from Controlled Falling. Altitude Drop: If you end your turn midair, you Controlled Fall 4 Spaces. Glide Speed: You can use your movement to glide horizontally.

traits.name: Radiant Weakness
traits.description: You have Radiant Vulnerability (1).

traits.name: Divine Dampening
traits.description: You recover 1 less HP when healed from divine sources.

traits.name: Beastkind
traits.description: You can understand and speak to (in a limited capacity) the species of Beast your Beastborn is modeled after. You can understand the meaning of their noises and behaviors, and they understand the meanings of simple words, concepts, or states of emotion. Below is a list of Beast Traits. You can only choose a Beast Trait once unless it says otherwise.

traits.name: Darkvision
traits.description: You have Darkvision 10 Spaces.

traits.name: Echolocation
traits.description: You can spend 1 AP to roar, scream, or screech to gain Blindsight in a 10 Spaces radius that lasts until the start of your next turn. The sound can be heard from up to 100 Spaces away. You gain no benefit from this Trait in an area of Silence.

traits.name: Keen Sense
traits.description: Choose 1 of the following senses: hearing, sight, or smell. You make Awareness Checks with ADV using the chosen sense. You can choose this trait multiple times, choosing a different sense each time.

traits.name: Sunlight Sensitivity
traits.description: While you or your target is in sunlight, you have DisADV on Attacks and Awareness Checks that rely on sight.

traits.name: Quick Reactions
traits.description: While you aren't wearing Armor, you gain +1 PD.

traits.name: Climb Speed
traits.description: You gain a Climb Speed equal to your Ground Speed.

traits.name: Spider Climb
traits.description: (requires Climb Speed) You can walk without falling on the ceiling and vertical surfaces normally without needing to Climb.

traits.name: Web Walk
traits.description: You can walk along and through webs unimpeded. Additionally, you know the location of any creature that's in contact with the same web.

traits.name: Water Breathing
traits.description: You can breathe underwater.

traits.name: Swim Speed
traits.description: You gain a Swim Speed equal to your Ground Speed. Additionally, your Breath Duration increases by 3.

traits.name: Speed Increase
traits.description: Your Speed increases by 1 Space.

traits.name: Sprint
traits.description: You can use your Minor Action to take the Move Action. Once you use this Trait, you can't use it again until you take a turn without taking the Move Action.

traits.name: Charge
traits.description: If you move at least 2 Spaces in a straight line before making a Melee Attack, the damage of the Attack increases by 1.

traits.name: Burrow Speed
traits.description: You gain a Burrow Speed equal to half your Movement Speed.

traits.name: Jumper
traits.description: Your Jump Distance increases by 2, and you can take the Jump Action as a Minor Action.

traits.name: Strong Jumper
traits.description: You no longer need to move 2 Spaces before performing a Running Jump, and you take 0 damage from Controlled Falling 5 Spaces or less.

traits.name: Glide Speed
traits.description: You have a set of wings that you can use to horizontally glide and slow your descent. Provided you aren't Incapacitated, you gain the following benefits while in the air: Controlled Falling: You suffer no damage from Controlled Falling. Altitude Drop: If you end your turn midair, you Controlled Fall 4 Spaces. Glide Speed: You can use your movement to glide horizontally.

traits.name: Limited Flight
traits.description: (requires Glide Speed) You have a set of wings that grant you limited flight. Provided you aren't Incapacitated, you gain the following benefits: Vertical Ascent: You can spend 2 Spaces of movement to ascend 1 Space vertically. Hover: When you end your turn in the air, you maintain your altitude.

traits.name: Full Flight
traits.description: (requires Limited Flight) You have a Fly Speed equal to your Ground Speed.

traits.name: Flyby
traits.description: (requires Limited Flight) You don't provoke Opportunity Attacks when you Fly out of an enemy's reach.

traits.name: Stealth Feathers
traits.description: (requires Limited Flight) You have ADV on Stealth Checks while Flying.

traits.name: Winged Arms
traits.description: (requires any Flying Beast Trait) Your arms are also your wings. Anytime you use a Glide Speed or Flying Speed, you can't hold anything in your hands.

traits.name: Tough
traits.description: Your HP maximum increases by 1.

traits.name: Thick-Skinned
traits.description: While you aren't wearing Armor, you gain +1 AD.

traits.name: Hazardous Hide
traits.description: You have spikes, retractable barbs, poisonous skin, or some other form of defense mechanism to keep creatures from touching you. Choose 1 of the following damage types: Corrosion, Piercing, or Poison. While you're physically Grappled, your Grappler takes 1 damage of the chosen type at the start of each of its turns. Creatures that start their turn Grappled by you also take this damage.

traits.name: Powerful Build
traits.description: You increase by 1 Size, but you occupy the Space of a creature 1 Size smaller.

traits.name: Long-Limbed
traits.description: When you make a Melee Martial Attack, your reach is 1 Space greater than normal.

traits.name: Additional Limb
traits.description: You have an additional limb (such as an extra arm or prehensile tail or trunk) that has a range of 1 Space. You can use it to lift, hold, or drop objects, and to push, pull, or grapple creatures. It can't wield Weapons, Shields, or Spell Focuses, and you can't use it to perform the Somatic Components of Spells. You can choose this Trait multiple times.

traits.name: Capable Limb
traits.description: (requires Additional Limb) You can now use your limb to wield Weapons, Shields, or Spell Focuses, and perform the Somatic Components of Spells. You can choose this Trait multiple times, but only once per Additional Limb.

traits.name: Natural Armor
traits.description: (requires Thick-Skinned) While not wearing Armor, you gain PDR.

traits.name: Hard Shell
traits.description: (requires Thick-Skinned) You have a large shell around your body for protection. Your AD increases by 1 (while you're not wearing Armor), your Movement Speed decreases by 1, and you're immune to being Flanked.

traits.name: Shell Retreat
traits.description: (requires Hard Shell) Your body has a shell that you can retreat into. You can spend 1 AP to retreat into or come back out of your shell. You gain +5 PD and AD, PDR, EDR and ADV on Might Saves. While in your shell, you're Prone, you can't move, you have DisADV on Agility Saves, and you can't take Reactions.

traits.name: Camouflage
traits.description: You can change the color and pattern of your body. You have ADV on Stealth Checks while motionless.

traits.name: Prowler
traits.description: You have ADV on Stealth Checks while in Darkness.

traits.name: Cold Resistance
traits.description: You have Cold Resistance (Half) and Resistance to Exhaustion from cold temperatures.

traits.name: Fire Resistance
traits.description: You have Fire Resistance (Half) and Resistance to Exhaustion from hot temperatures.

traits.name: Short-Legged
traits.description: Your Speed decreases by 1 Space.

traits.name: Small-Sized
traits.description: Your Size is considered Small.

traits.name: Reckless
traits.description: Your PD decreases by 1.

traits.name: Natural Weapon
traits.description: You have up to 2 Natural Weapons (claws, horns, fangs, tail, etc.) which you can use to make Unarmed Strikes that deal 1 Bludgeoning, Piercing, or Slashing damage (your choice upon gaining this Trait). You can perform Martial Enhancements with your Natural Weapons. The following Traits require the Natural Weapon Trait:

traits.name: Extended Natural Weapon
traits.description: Your Natural Weapon now has the Reach Property.

traits.name: Natural Projectile
traits.description: You can use your Natural Weapon to make a Ranged Martial Attack with a Range of 10 Spaces. The Natural Weapon might produce a spine, barb, fluid, or other harmful projectile (your choice).

traits.name: Natural Weapon Style
traits.description: You can choose 1 Weapon Style that fits your desired Natural Weapon. You can use the chosen Style's Weapon Enhancement when attacking with your Natural Weapon.

traits.name: Rend
traits.description: You can spend 1 AP when making an Attack Check with your Natural Weapon to force the target to make a Physical Save. Failure: Target begins Bleeding.

traits.name: Retractable Natural Weapon
traits.description: Your Natural Weapon is able to be concealed or retracted and gains the Concealable Property (gain ADV on the first Attack Check you make in Combat).

traits.name: Venomous Natural Weapon
traits.description: When you Hit a creature with your Natural Weapon, they make a Physical Save against your Save DC. Failure: The target becomes Impaired until the start of your next turn.

traits.name: Fast Reflexes
traits.description: You gain ADV on Initiative Checks and on the first Attack Check you make in Combat.

traits.name: Mimicry
traits.description: You can mimic simple sounds that you've heard (such as a baby's crying, the creak of a door, or single words) and repeat short 3 word phrases that sound identical to what you heard. A creature can make an Insight Check contested by your Trickery Check to determine if this sound is real.

traits.name: Intimidating Shout
traits.description: Once per Combat, you can spend 1 AP to let out an Intimidating Shout. All creatures within 5 Spaces that can hear you must make a Charisma Save contested by your Attack Check. Failure: A target is Hindered on the next Attack Check or Spell Attack it makes before the start of your next turn.

traits.name: Toxic Fortitude
traits.description: You have Poison Resistance (Half) and ADV on Saves against being Poisoned.

traits.name: Shoot Webs
traits.description: You can spend 1 AP to shoot web at a target within 5 Spaces. Make an Attack Check contested by the target's Physical Save. Success: The target is Restrained by webbing and can spend 1 AP on their turn to attempt to escape (Acrobatics or Athletics Check vs your Save DC). The webbing can also be attacked and destroyed (PD 5, AD 10, 2 HP; Immunity to Bludgeoning, Poison, and Psychic damage).
